changes.details: First image gen pricing collection: 7 services, range $0.0027-$0.134/image. Cheapest: Together AI Flux Schnell ($0.0027). Most expensive: Google Imagen 3 ($0.134).
Health checks for 7 image generation services. 6 services at 100% uptime. Black Forest Labs Flux Pro showing 0% uptime (timeout issues on health endpoint).
